name: Beef Casserole with Edam
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Black olives, pitted and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook onion in butter over moderate heat until golden.
2. Add steak, tomatoes, and bell pepper. Cook, stirring, over medium-high heat until veggies are softened.
3. Add egg, raisins, olives, gherkins, and mushrooms; stir for 1 minute.
4. Add brandy, heated, and ignite gently.
5. When flame goes out, stir in flour and cook for 2 minutes.
6. Stir in broth, chili paste, chili sauce, ketchup, Tabasco, salt, and pepper to taste. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
7. Line the sides of a 2-quart shallow casserole with some cheese slices.
8. Pour beef mixture into the casserole and cover with remaining Edam.
9. Place casserole in larger pan, add enough water to reach 1-inch up the sides, and cover with foil.
10. Bake at preheated 325°F for 15 minutes.
11. Serve with sauteed bananas.
